input.user_input: Change the arbitration provision to require AAA rules instead of JAMS. Also change the seat of arbitration from San Francisco to Chicago.

actual:

Please upload the contract or agreement you would like me to modify, and I will gladly update the clause to require AAA rules and change the seat of arbitration to Chicago.
